parsed_output.justification: James is highly suspicious due to his fake Seer claim; both Justin and Paul noted that his physical actions during the Night phase did not match the behavior of a Seer looking at center cards. Justin claims to be the Troublemaker and states that he swapped the cards of James and Paul. If James was the starting Werewolf and Justin is the Troublemaker, the swap would make Paul the final Werewolf. Since James is aggressively pushing the vote toward Paul and Justin agrees, the most consistent conclusion is that Paul currently holds the Werewolf card.
